skills.name: evidence_gap_auditor
skills.description: Find unsupported claims and identify missing evidence links.
skills.summary: Audit evidence sufficiency and surface weak claim chains.
skills.template:
Evidence Gap Audit:
- Query: {query}
- Findings: [unsupported claim clusters]
- Recommendation: [add citations before final decision]

skills.name: ops_readiness_checker
skills.description: Assess implementation readiness from plan quality and dependency completeness.
skills.summary: Compute readiness confidence and blocker list.
skills.template:
Ops Readiness Check:
- Query: {query}
- Readiness: MEDIUM
- Blockers: [missing owner, weak dependency proof]
- Immediate Action: [assign critical milestones]

skills.name: stakeholder_map_builder
skills.description: Extract stakeholder groups, interests, and tension points from context.
skills.summary: Produce a stakeholder map for strategy and communication planning.
skills.template:
Stakeholder Map:
- Query: {query}
- Groups: [leadership, operations, compliance]
- Tensions: [speed vs safety]
- Suggested messaging tracks: [executive, implementation, governance]
